name: Crawfish Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cornmeal, cooking oil, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Add the cream-style corn, eggs, grated cheese, onion, and crawfish tails to the dry mixture. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Fold in the chopped jalapeno peppers.
4. Grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared dish.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes or until golden brown.
